title: Questions from Quarantine: Staying Safe and Social as Fall Begins
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series aims to provide advice on maintaining mental well-being and hygiene during the global health crisis, specifically addressing audience-submitted questions. It encourages public participation through social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine and promotes weekly Tuesday sessions. The context is the ongoing pandemic as fall begins, with a focus on staying safe while managing social needs. The content is promotional for the series and does not delve into specific technical or policy details of public health measures.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为'隔离问题'的每周网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在在全球健康危机期间，就保持心理健康和卫生提供建议，特别回应观众提交的问题。文章鼓励公众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签参与，并宣传每周二的会议。背景是秋季开始之际持续的疫情，重点是在满足社交需求的同时保持安全。内容是对该系列的宣传，并未深入探讨公共卫生措施的具体技术或政策细节。
